chapters.title: One Piece
chapters.summary: 'Nerona Imu Descends' — Imu's true form is revealed for the first time. Despite the Five Elders' objections, Imu descends to Elbaf, surrounding Aurust Castle with massive black flames and bringing the environment to life. Imu appears with S-shaped horns, a devil-like tail and wings, white hair, and circular tattoos — wielding a polearm. Zoro finds Saint Sommers' heart and forms a plan to destroy it. Next chapter 1180 expected April 19, 2026.

chapters.title: Nano Machine
chapters.summary: Backstory flashback: the White Tiger first encountered Sakyung when he was in danger, wiped out the intruders and left without pursuing their essence. Intrigued, the White Tiger began keeping watch over Sakyung — one of many martial artists who settled on the mountain to polish their skills.

chapters.title: Dandadan
chapters.summary: Okarun and Aira share a wholesome moment at the dinosaur exhibit — both had secretly studied dinosaurs just to talk to each other. Okarun suggests regrouping with Momo and Jiji. Slice-of-life arc continues with supernatural threat looming in the background.

chapters.title: Blue Lock
chapters.summary: 'Recapture' — Karasu passes to Shidou, but Barou intercepts and fires an immediate shot, making it 1-1. Karasu steps up to declare himself the new team leader, leaving Isagi wondering about his own role. France's coach Rodin pushes Loki and Hugo toward a more aggressive counterattack strategy. Next chapter 343 expected April 14, 2026.

chapters.title: Sakamoto Days
chapters.summary: A power outage spreads across all of Tokyo while citizens notice only one lit location — an old castle. The chapter features a confrontation involving Shishiba (Ponytail) against Gozu. Next chapter 255 expected April 12, 2026.

chapters.title: Kingdom
chapters.summary: 'Allies' Self-Sacrifice' — 19 pages. Ongoing Great War of Qin and Zhao arc. Weekly serialization continues in Young Jump. Chapters 872-873 confirmed in Fandom wiki; release dates TBA for April 2026.

chapters.title: Eleceed
chapters.summary: 'Shadows' — Jiwoo trains under Kartein and learns to incorporate healing mana into his electrical strikes, preventing the physical recoil that has been slowing him in high-intensity battles. Series continues weekly on Naver/WEBTOON.

chapters.title: Spy x Family
chapters.summary: Filming of the drama 'Five-Year Love Plan' during a hijacking scenario: Yuri learns about Yor's upcoming kiss scene and panics. Loid devises a plan for Yuri to disguise as Yor via a revolving door, successfully averting the kiss. Audiences and terrorists alike are fooled. Yor quietly wonders if Loid is jealous. Next chapter 132 expected April 12, 2026.

chapters.title: Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint
chapters.summary: 'Context of the Constellations (3)' — The protagonist thinks 'This is a development that I know of' — and in that moment the world is destroyed and a new universe unfolds. Yoo Sangah refuses to open the door and meet the protagonist. Ongoing dramatic escalation.

chapters.title: Marriage Toxin
chapters.summary: Chapter 159 released April 7, 2026 (19 pages). Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues. Anime adaptation by Bones Film premiered April 7, 2026 to strong reception. Series has 17 tankōbon volumes.

chapters.title: WITCH WATCH
chapters.summary: Weekly serialization in Weekly Shonen Jump continues. Series has 25 compiled volumes as of early 2026. Chapter 242 available on VIZ/MangaPlus.

chapters.title: One Punch Man
chapters.summary: 'Life or Death 2' — Neo Heroes Uprising Arc continues. Features Tatsumaki, Aggregation, Blue, and the debut of Eel Dragon; Genos also appears. Previous chapter had Tatsumaki facing insect swarms after seemingly defeating Aggregation.

chapters.title: Solo Leveling: Ragnarok
chapters.summary: Season 2 finale. Series on hiatus since January 7, 2026 after illustrator JIN departed for mandatory military service. Redice Studios will continue with a new artist; return expected around May/June 2026.

chapters.title: Tower of God
chapters.summary: Season 3 Episode 235 (overall Ep. 653) — Season 3 Finale. Main series on extended hiatus since February 2025. Spin-off 'Tower of God: Urek Mazino' remains active with Chapter 58 released April 7, 2026.

chapters.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
chapters.summary: On indefinite hiatus since October 2025 due to health concerns for author Yamada and illustrator Abe. No confirmed return date announced as of April 2026.

chapters.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
chapters.summary: Main series concluded with Chapter 271 (September 2024). Spin-off 'Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo' by Gege Akutami/Yuji Iwasaki also concluded with Chapter 25 on March 8, 2026.

chapters.title: My Hero Academia
chapters.summary: Main series concluded with Chapter 430 plus bonus epilogue Chapter 431 bundled with final Volume 42. A special TV program adapting Ch. 431 premieres May 2, 2026.

chapters.title: Kaiju No. 8
chapters.summary: Main series completed with 129 chapters across 16 volumes (July 2025). Spin-off 'Kaiju No. 8: Relax' remains ongoing on Shonen Jump+.

chapters.title: Vinland Saga
chapters.summary: Final chapter planned. Series approaching its conclusion after 20 years. Manga collected into 29 total volumes.

chapters.title: Chainsaw Man
chapters.summary: Series concluded with Chapter 232 — Academy Saga (Part 2) finale. Part 1 had 97 chapters; Part 2 had 135 chapters for a total of 232. Final Volume 24 releases June 4, 2026.
